name: spinner-basic
visual_summary: A basic spinner component is a simple circular or oval-shaped animation used to indicate waiting or loading states. It is commonly used on buttons, forms, and other interactive elements for a short duration to prevent users from clicking repeatedly while the application processes something. This component typically blends in with its surrounding environment without drawing attention.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: spinner-basic
Description: A basic spinner component is a simple circular or oval-shaped animation used to indicate waiting or loading states. It is commonly used on buttons, forms, and other interactive elements for a short duration to prevent users from clicking repeatedly while the application processes something. This component typically blends in with its surrounding environment without drawing attention.
Style: Simple, Material
Interactions: Animated, None (passive)
Tags: Loading Indicator, Waiting State, Animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
